channel.title: Dilraba · Fan Info Site
channel.description: Latest news, story features, and site updates — unofficial Dilraba Dilmurat fan site.

item.title: Land Rover Defender Urban Camp · Shanghai Event
item.description: At the Land Rover Defender Urban Camp in Shanghai in a Julien Fournié custom white suit — first public offline appearance since the June ambassador announcement.

item.title: Story · Land Rover Defender · Announcement & Shanghai Urban Camp
item.description: Ambassador announced June 20; July 3 Urban Camp in Shanghai in Julien Fournié custom couture.

item.title: Site update · Added Land Rover ambassador (Jun 20), Shanghai Urban Camp (Jul 3), and VOGUE August solo cover shoot (Jul 1)
item.description: Added Land Rover ambassador (Jun 20), Shanghai Urban Camp (Jul 3), and VOGUE August solo cover shoot (Jul 1)

item.title: Site update · Added Lucky Coffee premium coffee global ambassador announcement (Apr 19)
item.description: Added Lucky Coffee premium coffee global ambassador announcement (Apr 19)

item.description: Corrected unverified claims such as premature grand slam and "100-city screens" in Deeyeo entries

item.description: Gallery lightbox with keyboard navigation; character guessing quiz on the fans page

item.title: VOGUE China August 2026 Solo Cover Shoot Completed
item.description: Fashion media report the August 2026 VOGUE China solo cover shoot wrapped July 1 — first post-90s actress to complete all five major women's magazine solo covers; official release TBA.

item.title: Story · VOGUE August Solo Cover · Big Five Solo-Cover Grand Slam
item.description: Fashion media report the August 2026 VOGUE China solo cover shoot on July 1 — first post-90s actress with all five major solo covers.

item.title: Macalline Shenyang Event · Fans Sing "Chaser of Light"
item.description: At a Macalline brand event in Shenyang, fans sang "Chaser of Light" in a widely shared moment of warm interaction.

item.title: Story · Macalline Shenyang · Fans Sing "Chaser of Light"
item.description: Macalline brand event in Shenyang, June 27–28 — warm fan interactions and a group sing-along of "Chaser of Light."

item.title: Announced Land Rover Defender Brand Ambassador
item.description: Officially announced as Land Rover Defender brand ambassador on June 20 — "Unstoppable" spirit with the brand.

item.title: China Film & TV Night · CMG Recommended TV Actress
item.description: First red carpet in 605 days in Georges Hobeika couture and Mikimoto jewels; CMG Recommended TV Actress for Sword Rose.

item.title: Story · China Film & TV Night · Red Carpet & CMG Actress Honor
item.description: Her return to the red carpet after 605 days — Georges Hobeika couture, Mikimoto jewels, and CMG Recommended TV Actress for Sword Rose.

item.title: Announced Deeyeo Global Brand Ambassador
item.description: Officially announced as global brand ambassador for Deeyeo on June 13, with reported multi-city campaigns and co-branded merchandise.

item.title: Story · Deeyeo Global Ambassador · Multi-City Campaign & Merch
item.description: Countdown teasers June 10–12 led to the June 13 global ambassador launch — reported citywide screens and co-branded merchandise.

item.title: 2026 Birthday · June Schedule
item.description: Studio shared birthday wishes on June 3 and released the June schedule.

item.title: Site update · 图片本地化托管
item.description: 图片本地化托管

item.title: Marie Claire June Birthday Cover
item.description: Covers Marie Claire China June 2026 birthday issue "AS SHE IS" with couture looks and Mikimoto jewelry.

item.title: Story · Marie Claire June · "AS SHE IS"
item.description: June 2026 birthday cover "AS SHE IS" with couture looks and Mikimoto jewelry.

item.title: June Schedule · Macalline Brand Event
item.description: Studio released the June schedule — a Macalline brand event is set for June 27.

item.title: You Can't Have Everything — First Trailer
item.description: iQiyi Micro Drama released the first trailer — Dilraba plays twin Wei Lans alongside Chen Haosen, adapted from Yamamoto Fumio's novel.

item.title: Announced Lucky Coffee Premium Coffee Global Ambassador
item.description: Mixue Group's Lucky Coffee announced Dilraba as premium coffee global ambassador and Tony Leung as brand ambassador — "Believe in Luck" campaign TVC.

item.title: Story · Lucky Coffee Global Ambassador · "Believe in Luck"
item.description: Lucky Coffee announced April 19 — Dilraba as premium coffee global ambassador with Tony Leung in the brand TVC; bayberry series launch.

item.title: Moonlit Reunion Premieres on Tencent Video
item.description: Fantasy romance (formerly Mu Xu Ci) premiered on Tencent Video — Dilraba as ghost queen He Simu with Chen Feiyu.

item.title: Dior Suzhou High Jewelry Event
item.description: Attended Dior's Suzhou high jewelry dinner as global ambassador in Belle Dior jewels.

item.title: Story · Dior Suzhou VILLA DIOR · Belle Dior High Jewelry
item.description: As Dior global ambassador at the Suzhou VILLA DIOR dinner in Belle Dior high jewelry — continuing a deep brand partnership.

item.title: ELLE China March 2026 Season Opener
item.description: Covers ELLE China March 2026 season opener — theme "Within Change".

item.title: Story · ELLE March 2026 Season Opener · "Within Change"
item.description: ELLE China March 2026 season opener — theme "Within Change" showcasing versatile fashion presence.

item.title: Nine Heavens — Starts Filming
item.description: Joined Tencent's republic-era suspense anthology Nine Heavens, filming with Yin Fang in Fujian tulou settings.

item.title: Legend from the Hidden Niche Premieres
item.description: Fantasy adventure premieres on Tencent Video with Chen Xingxu as Nie Jiuluo.

item.title: Harper's BAZAAR September 2025 Cover
item.description: September 2025 cover story "Limitless".

item.title: Sword Rose on CCTV Primetime
item.description: Anti-trafficking drama on CCTV-8 primetime — Dilraba as officer Deng Yan.

item.title: Dior Paris Fashion Week
item.description: Invited to Dior's Paris Fashion Week show on the international stage.

item.title: The Prosecution Premieres
item.description: Legal drama premieres — Dilraba as prosecutor An Ni, a realism pivot.
